productDisplayName: Nike Men Khaki Dunk High Casual Shoes
description: Style Note Designed for superior performance and comfort, the nike Dunk High has a high heel counter to provide ample structural support to the ankle, protecting it from sprains and injuries when running. Coupled with an uber cool styling, this shoe has a superior traction feature that makes the nike Dunk High a huge favourite both on the track and off it. Product Details Fabric uppers for added breathability and dry, fresh comfort  High profile design provides ankle support  High ankle cup for added support and snug Fit to the backfoot and ankle  Padded tongue and sockliner for snug fit and added protection from shock  Lace-up system for snug fit Full length PU midsole for added cushioning and impact protection TPU outsole with herringbone grooves Material and Care Synthetic Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean  Do not store under sunlight
